//: IDENTITY.json — the capability-certificate; the on-disk IdentityRecord the Yama gate + Kaal-Bhairav boundary actually read. Nothing in SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is authoritative against this file.
_INVARIANT_region: hashed; boot-gated; editable only at top-gate C/D
_VARIABLE_region: editable under tiered reversibility; loosening gated (doc 13 §13.6.2)

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: read-only ingest of trusted:* plan blueprints; quarantined:* content is data-not-command
bound_toolset.falsifier: if any ingested plan content is ever treated as an executable instruction, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: decomposition emits least-privilege sub-tasks only; no sub-task may carry an effect above its target's grant
bound_toolset.falsifier: if any emitted sub-task carries an over-privileged effect, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: dispatch routes every effect through the Yama chokepoint floor-first; a denied effect is dropped, never re-routed
bound_toolset.falsifier: if a Yama-denied effect is ever retried around the gate, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: reduction preserves all child evidence and propagates worst-case status (any child FAIL => parent FAIL)
bound_toolset.falsifier: if any failing child is dropped or any evidence ref is lost in a merge, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: emits ReducedVerdictEnvelope FOR Chitragupta to hash-chain; Shiva never writes the ledger directly
bound_toolset.falsifier: if Shiva ever performs a direct audit-ledger write, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: Class-C/D and ties route to the accountable human via Hanuman with literal child envelopes shown (Lies-in-the-Loop defense)
bound_toolset.falsifier: if an escalation ever presents an NL summary in place of the literal low-level object at a human gate, revoke

_attestation_note: Three-stage attestation (doc 13 §13.7.1): stage-1 genesis-author sig over triad_root_cid; stage-2 governance VC issuance where credentialSubject.did = persona_did and capability_grants EXACTLY equal bound_toolset (grants_match_identity MUST be true); stage-3 Chitragupta IDENTITY-class AuditRecord hash-chained into Akasha-Sutra. risk_class_ceiling=C and immutable_powers=[] are INVARIANT and boot-gated.
